question: १९९१ च्या जनगणना वर्षासाठी, अंडमान आणि निकोबार बेटांच्या राज्यातील ग्रामीण भागांसाठी ठिकाणांची नावे, एकूण लोकसंख्या आणि एकूण घरगुतींची संख्या, एकूण लोकसंख्येच्या उतरत्या क्रमाने यादी करा.
gold_sql: SELECT T1.LOCATION_NAME, SUM(T3.TOTAL_POPULATION), SUM(T2.NUMBER_OF_HOUSEHOLDS) FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY_HIERARCHY AS T1 JOIN FACT_HOUSING AS T2 ON T1.HIERARCHY_ID = T2.HIERARCHY_ID JOIN FACT_POPULATION_CORE AS T3 ON T1.HIERARCHY_ID = T3.HIERARCHY_ID WHERE T1.STATE = 'Andaman And Nicobar Islands' AND T1.LOCATION_TYPE = 'Rural' AND T2.CENSUS_YEAR = 1991 AND T3.CENSUS_YEAR = 1991 GROUP BY T1.LOCATION_NAME ORDER BY SUM(T3.TOTAL_POPULATION) DESC
predicted_sql:
SELECT dim_geography_hierarchy.location_name, fact_population_core.total_population, fact_housing.number_of_households
FROM dim_geography_hierarchy
JOIN fact_population_core ON dim_geography_hierarchy.hierarchy_id = fact_population_core.hierarchy_id
JOIN fact_housing ON dim_geography_hierarchy.hierarchy_id = fact_housing.hierarchy_id
WHERE dim_geography_hierarchy.state ILIKE 'Andaman And Nicobar Islands'
AND dim_geography_hierarchy.location_type ILIKE 'Rural'
AND fact_population_core.census_year = 1991
AND fact_housing.census_year = 1991
ORDER BY fact_population_core.total_population DESC;
raw_output:

AND fact_population_core.census_year = 1991
AND fact_housing.census_year = 1991
ORDER BY fact_population_core.total_population DESC;

question: १९९१ च्या जनगणना वर्षात 'अंदमान आणि निकोबार बेटे' या राज्यासाठी, प्रत्येक जिल्हा आणि त्याची गणना केलेली घरगुती घनता (एकूण घरगुती संख्या लीन एकूण व्यापलेल्या निवासी घरांच्या संख्येने) यादी करा, जिथे एकूण व्यापलेली निवासी घरे शून्यापेक्षा जास्त असली पाहिजेत, आणि सर्वाधिक घनता असलेले शीर्ष १० जिल्हे दाखवा.

    "fact_housing" ON "dim_geography_hierarchy"."hierarchy_id" = "fact_housing"."hierarchy_id"
JOIN 
    "fact_workers_primary_sector" ON "dim_geography_hierarchy"."hierarchy_id" = "fact_workers_primary_sector"."hierarchy_id"
WHERE 
    "fact_housing"."census_year" = 1991
    AND "fact_workers_primary_sector"."census_year" = 1991
GROUP BY 
    "dim_geography_hierarchy"."state"
ORDER BY 
    total_households DESC;
